name: Diana Nguyen
title: Design Engineer
heroSubtitle: A digitized pile of projects and interests, organized just enough to be a website.

bio: Based in Washington, I'm a lifelong nerd, endlessly interested about how things work and how they feel. I've spent the last 5+ years building and integrating product UI as a frontend engineer at Warner Bros. Discovery, and I'm currently finishing a Master's in HCI at DePaul because I want to understand people better and build better experiences for them.
Outside of work, I'm a chronic collector of hobbies and half-finished projects, always in the middle of learning or making something.
Curious about most things, enthusiastic about too many!
credentials: Frontend Engineer · Warner Bros. Discovery · 5+ years
B.S. Computer Science · Video Game Design & Development · University of Louisiana
Certified Accessible Player Experience Practitioner · Game Accessibility
